bird.name: Black-headed honeyeater
bird.summary: The black-headed honeyeater (Melithreptus affinis) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is one of two members of the genus M…

locations.name: 金岛
locations.summary: 金岛（英语：King Island）是澳大利亚的一个岛屿，位于巴斯海峡西端，塔斯马尼亚岛西北方。该岛得名于新南威尔士总督菲利普·金。该岛面积1,098平方公里，2007年人口1,723。该岛于1799年由里德船长发现。该岛最大城镇为柯里。…

locations.name: 弗诺群岛
locations.summary: 弗诺群岛是澳大利亚的一个群岛，位于巴斯海峡东端，塔斯马尼亚岛东北方，包含52个岛屿。该群岛得名于英国航海家托拜厄斯·弗诺。该群岛最大岛屿为費蓮達島，其余较大的岛屿有巴倫角島、克拉克岛。该群岛总面积2，670平方公里。群岛上有锡矿。

relations.subject: Black-headed honeyeater
relations.evidence: The black-headed honeyeater is endemic to Tasmania as well as King Island and the Furneaux Group, where it inhabits wet and dry sclerophyll forests, as well as scrub and heathland, and subalpine habitats to an altitude of 1200 m (4000 ft)

relations.subject: Black-headed honeyeater
